channel.title: 2026-05-09 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-05-09 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: 面向软体机器人的拓扑驱动抗纠缠控制
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Haoyang Le, Shengxuan Wang, Mohan Chen, Shuo Feng
针对高密度障碍与不稳定环境下多智能体强化学习的可观测性挑战，本文提出拓扑驱动的多智能体强化学习（TD-MARL）框架协调多机器人系统避免纠缠。关键网络采用集中学习使各智能体通过共享拓扑状态感知他者策略，分布式执行消除机器人间通信需求，集成拓扑安全层保障系统可靠性。详情需查阅原文。

item.title: GlazyBench: A Benchmark for Ceramic Glaze Property Prediction and Image Generation
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ziyu Zhai, Siyou Li, Juexi Shao, Juntao Yu
arXiv:2605.06641v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Developing ceramic glazes is a costly, time-consuming process of trial and error due to complex chemistry, placing a significant burden on independent artists. While recent advances in multimodal AI offer a modern solution, the field lacks the large-scale datasets required to train these models. We propose GlazyBench, the first dataset for AI-assisted glaze design. Comprising 23,148 real glaze formulations, GlazyBench supports two primary tasks: predicting post-firing surface properties, such as color and transparency, from raw materials, and generating accurate visual representations of the glaze based on these properties. We establish comprehensive baselines for property prediction using traditional machine learning and large language mode…

item.title: 面向大语言模型可解释性的补丁效应图核方法
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ruben Fernandez-Boullon, David N. Olivieri
本文将机制可解释性中的激活修补分析重构为图机器学习问题，提出补丁效应图核框架。通过因果中介、偏相关和共影响三种图构建方法，将修补轮廓表示为模型组件上的图结构。在GPT-2 Small的间接宾语识别任务上，局部边-槽特征比全局图形状描述符具有更高分类精度；筛选后的配对修补验证表明共影响与偏相关选择的边对应更强的激活影响效应。

item.title: HaM-World: Soft-Hamiltonian World Models with Selective Memory for Planning
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Haoyun Tang, Haodong Cui, Keyao Xu, Kun Wang, Zhandong Mei
arXiv:2605.05951v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: World models enable model-based planning through learned latent dynamics, but imagined rollouts become unstable as the planning horizon grows or the dynamics distribution shifts. We argue that this instability reflects two missing structures in planner-facing latents: history-conditioned memory for approximate Markov completeness, and geometric organization that separates configuration, momentum, and task semantics. We propose HaM-World (HMW), a structured world model that decomposes the latent state into a canonical (q, p) subspace and a context subspace c, while using Mamba selective state-space memory as the history-conditioned input to the same latent dynamics. Within this interface, (q, p) evolves through an energy-derived Hamiltonian v…

item.title: [ASAP] Wilson Loop as a Tool to Investigate Chirality-Induced Spin Selectivity: Role of Vibrations and Multiple Channels
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 L. Celada, D. K. A. Phan Huu, A. Chiesa, P. Santini, L. Griguolo, and S. Carretta
The Journal of Physical Chemistry Letters DOI: 10.1021/acs.jpclett.6c00585

item.title: A method for analyzing the functional stability of blockchain ecosystems and platforms under quantum-computing-assisted attack
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Sergei Petrenko, Alexei Petrenko, Natalie Grigorieva, Artyom Balyabin
Modern national blockchain ecosystems and platforms must account for emerging quantum threats. Currently, however, there are no formalized methods for the quantitative assessment of blockchain stability under adversarial quantum attacks. The development of such a methodology enables a quantitative evaluation of quantum impacts on various ecosystem components, the establishment of resilience metrics, and the prediction of potential compromise timelines for cryptographic primitives, given the capabilities of contemporary quantum hardware. This article proposes and substantiates an original method for analyzing the quantum resilience of national blockchain ecosystems – including those based on Enterprise Ethereum Alliance, Waves Enterprise (Waves, Vostok), Hyperledger Fabric (Linux, IBM), Co…

item.title: 全固态铁电梯度掺杂可重构二碲化钼器件
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Ruixuan Peng, Jiayuan Chen, Bochen Zhao, Boxuan Zhang, Yonghuang Wu, Run Shi, Yiqun Liu, Zonglin Li, Jing Guo, Ting Pan, Wenjian Lang, Jing Ma, Yang Shen, Kai Liu
该工作围绕全固态铁电梯度掺杂可重构二碲化钼（MoTe₂）器件展开，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 对"六铁氧体位点选择性掺杂产生双磁共振实现超宽带微波吸收"的更正

item.title: MAX系列材料的电磁功能：综述
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Jian Zhang, Ru Jia, Wenshi Zhao, Yang Liu, Haibo Li, Wenjuan Han, Ming Lu
该工作系统综述MAX相系列材料的电磁功能特性与研究进展，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: Electrospinning of hydroxypropyl chitosan nanofibers for bone regeneration application
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 junmei wang, jie xiong, guozhao li, ziliang zhou, yanyan yang, lu he
To futher explore the effect of electrospinning nanofiber mats synthesized using hydroxypropyl chitosan in conjugation with poly (vinyl alcohol) on the osteoconducive in MC3T3 cell, we tested different ratios of hydroxypropyl chitosan (HPCH) embedded with poly (vinyl alcohol) to electrospin the nanofiber mats, the mechanical and physical properties of nanofiber mats were verified by using SEM, FT-IR and conventional methods. Then the capacity of the electrospinning mats on osteoconducive in MC3T3 cell were evaluated by Alizarin Red stain, ALP stain and relative expression level of relevant genes. The results testified that the nanofiber mats embeded hydroxypropyl chitosan (50%)with poly (vinyl alcohol)(50%) can induce osteoblast differentiation apparently in MC3T3 cell.

item.title: Magnetic levitation triboelectric nanogenerator for vibration monitoring of hydroelectric units
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Yan hui Wang, Xiao Zhang, Song Xu, Fu tian Geng, Da Che, Guan zheng Xu 等9位作者
This paper proposes a self-powered, low-amplitude, high-precision vibration monitoring device with low amplitude, which is used to solve the problems of power supply dependence and poor monitoring effect of small vibrations in the vibration monitoring of traditional hydroelectric units. The device adopts a magnetic levitation structure, with friction layers attached to the upper and lower surfaces of the levitating magnetic poles. Even during minute vibrations, the mutually repulsive magnetic force helps increase the relative motion between the friction layers, generating a large vibration voltage and achieving the function of low-amplitude monitoring. Meanwhile, a magnetic field coil is placed outside the suspended magnetic pole. When vibration occurs, the up-and-down floating of the lev…

item.title: 40 Hz振荡经颅直流电刺激与iTBS的谷值相位耦合增强健康个体的皮质脊髓兴奋性与脑连接
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Xiaowei Ma, Shuaixiang Wang, Fangyuan Yan, Li Liu, Jiayi Liang, Mengwei Yuan 等11位作者
该研究探讨间歇性θ脉冲刺激(iTBS)与40 Hz振荡经颅直流电刺激(otDCS)在不同相位耦合下的神经生理效应，发现谷值相位耦合(troph-phase)较峰值相位耦合及单一模态刺激产生更持久的皮质脊髓兴奋性增强效应。TMS-EEG分析进一步显示谷值相位耦合在晚期阶段增强了定向信息流动，表明相位对齐影响联合刺激的后效应，为优化非侵入性神经调控策略提供依据。

item.title: Unity Quantum Yield of High‐Entropy Quantum Dots Composited With Photonic Crystals for Information Encryption
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Science: Table of Contents
👤 Maoyuan Huang, Ziqiang Tian, Binkun Xie, Haiyang Li, Bo Tan, Chang He, Shiliang Mei, Wanlu Zhang, Changchun Wang, Ruiqian Guo
Advanced Science, EarlyView.

item.title: 面向开集身份欺诈发现的布局感知表征学习
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jinxing Li, Nicholas Ren, Cathy Chang, Hongkai Pan, Daniel George
针对自适应攻击者导致历史欺诈标签失效的问题，本文研究布局感知的开集欺诈发现而非闭集分类。通过上下文感知SimMIM微调和复合损失监督度量学习适配DINOv3，模型仅用美国身份证训练即可在加拿大布局上达到99.83%布局分类精度。在20,448张加拿大身份证数据中，嵌入空间分析发现276例自适应物理欺诈（222例未被现有检测器检出），并支持从单一样本进行相似度扩展。

item.title: Microstructure-based variational deep material networks for robust uncertainty quantification in materials digital twins
item.description:
📚 npj Computational Materials
👤 Andreas E. Robertson, Samuel B. Inman, Ashley T. Lenau, Ricardo A. Lebensohn, Dongil Shin, Brad L. Boyce 等7位作者
npj Computational Materials, Published online: 09 May 2026; doi:10.1038/s41524-026-02054-5 Microstructure-based variational deep material networks for robust uncertainty quantification in materials digital twins
